differences: Primary mint is slightly darker in MVP CTA and active tab for accessibility contrast.
Ingredient list starts about 10-15px lower, so the third ingredient row is less visible above the fixed CTA.
Bottom tab icon paths follow the MVP HOME baseline and are close but not pixel-identical to the prototype icons.
suggestions: For a follow-up exact-polish pass, reduce tab or ingredient stepper vertical height by about 10px.
Keep the darker mint unless the accessibility gate accepts prototype mint on white text.

differences: Date chip text uses the current test date instead of the frozen prototype date.
Footer primary button uses darker accessible teal instead of prototype mint.
Underlying hero remains visible with MVP accessibility color treatment.
suggestions: Freeze browser Date in this evidence test if exact date text must match the Phase 3 reference.
Only lighten the primary button if a11y contrast stays green.

differences: Prototype shows multi-select state with two selected recipe books; current MVP contract saves one book per API call.
Sheet top starts about 25-30px higher because rows and footer are taller.
Confirm copy is '1개 레시피북 반영' instead of prototype's two-book copy.
suggestions: Do not fake multi-save visually without a matching API contract.
A later contract-evolution slice can add true multi-save and then update this sheet to exact two-selected parity.
Compact row spacing by a few pixels if visual parity is prioritized before multi-save is available.

overall.reasoning: Recipe detail and planner sheet now closely match the fixed Wave1 mobile prototype. Save sheet remains intentionally below exact threshold because the prototype assumes multi-select recipebook saving, while the current MVP API contract supports one selected book per save call.
next_actions: Ship this recipe detail group as a small Phase 4 PR.
Track save modal multi-select as a contract-evolution follow-up before trying to force exact visual parity.
